headline: Dow Jones Futures Fall, Oil Prices Jump; Trump Announces New Iran Talks With Hormuz Shut
summary: Futures fell and oil prices jumped with Iran keeping the Strait of Hormuz under "strict control." President Trump announced new talks Monday. Tesla earnings loom.

raw.headline: Dow Jones Futures Fall, Oil Prices Jump; Trump Announces New Iran Talks With Hormuz Shut
raw.summary: Futures fell and oil prices jumped with Iran keeping the Strait of Hormuz under "strict control." President Trump announced new talks Monday. Tesla earnings loom.

headline: Surging Q1 EPS Expectations Could Be A Game Changer For Freeport-McMoRan’s Copper Story (FCX)
summary: Freeport-McMoRan is set to release its quarterly earnings on April 23, 2026, with analysts expecting earnings per share of US$0.47, a very large year-over-year increase. This sharp improvement in anticipated profitability has drawn fresh attention to how the miner’s operational plans, policy exposures, and project pipeline might influence expectations for future performance. With earnings expectations sharply higher for the upcoming report, we’ll consider how this shapes Freeport-McMoRan’s...

headline: The Nasdaq's Historic Rally Doesn't Mean the Risk Is Gone
summary: Marc Chaikin of Chaikin Analytics shares seven bullish stock picks across AI infrastructure and semiconductors while warning investors to trim software and cybersecurity holdings.

headline: Dow Jones Futures, Oil Prices In Focus As Iran, Hormuz News Turns
summary: How will markets react as Iran says the Strait of Hormuz is still under its "strict control"? Tesla earnings loom.
